steps.t: Etta is in the Mead Hall of Floodwend. You should speak with Etta and hear her opinion.
Soldiers of Floodwend can be found guarding the three gates of the town.
There is a tower behind the Floodwend Mead Hall that offers a view of the forest. You should climb the tower and <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> f…
Radwig, Thane of Floodwend, awaits you in the Mead Hall. You should speak with Radwig and tell him of the information you gathered.
Etta is in the Mead Hall of Floodwend. You should speak with Etta.
